zh.lifeSummary: 當Sybil de Gifford於1052年出生在英國素可時，她的父親Adam Osborn Giffard of Fonthil43歲，母親Weva Crefon27歲。她於大約1081年與John de Comyn在蘇格蘭艾爾金爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。她去世於1098年在蘇格蘭音巴內-爾巴登享年46歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sybil de Gifford于1052年出生在英国素可时，她的父亲Adam Osborn Giffard of Fonthil43岁，母亲Weva Crefon27岁。她于大约1081年与John de Comyn在苏格兰艾爾金爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。她去世于1098年在苏格兰音巴內-爾巴登享年46岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Gifford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Giffard, either from the Middle English personal name Gifard, derived from an Old French name of this form deriving from ancient Germanic geb- ‘give, gift’ + hard- ‘hardy, brave’, or perhaps sometimes a nickname from Old French gif(f)ard ‘chubby-cheeked, bloated’.

variants.name: Jeffords
meanings: English: variant of Gifford , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Sybil
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the name (Greek Sibylla or Sybilla, with confusion over the vowels from an early period) of a class of ancient prophetesses inspired by Apollo. According to medieval theology, they were pagans denied the knowledge of Christ but blessed by God with some insight into things to come and accordingly admitted to heaven. It was thus regarded as a respectable name to be borne by Christians. This name was introduced to England by the Normans and enjoyed considerable popularity in the Middle Ages.

variants.name: Sybilla
meanings: From the name (Greek Sibylla or Sybilla, with confusion over the vowels from an early period) of a class of ancient prophetesses inspired by Apollo. It was thus regarded as a respectable name to be borne by Christians. This name was introduced to England by the Normans and enjoyed considerable popularity in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

en.lifeSummary: When Sybil de Gifford was born in 1052, in Sussex, England, her father, Adam Osborn Giffard of Fonthil, was 43 and her mother, Weva Crefon, was 27. She married John de Comyn about 1081, in Elginshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. She died in 1098, in Badenoch, Inverness-shire, Scotland, at the age of 46.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sybil de Gifford est née en 1052, à Sussex, Angleterre, son père, Adam Osborn Giffard of Fonthil, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Weva Crefon, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé John de Comyn environ 1081, à Elginshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Elle est décédée en 1098, à Badenoch, Inverness-shire, Écosse, à l’âge de 46 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sybil de Gifford 1052 in Sussex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Adam Osborn Giffard of Fonthil 43 und ihre Mutter Weva Crefon 27. Sie hat um 1081 in Elginshire, Scotland John de Comyn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Sie starb 1098 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Badenoch, Inverness-shire, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sybil de Gifford è nata il nel 1052 nel Sussex, England, sua padre, Adam Osborn Giffard of Fonthil, aveva 43 anni e sua madre, Weva Crefon, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato John de Comyn circa 1081, nel Elginshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì nel 1098, nel Badenoch, Inverness-shire, Scotland, all'età di 46 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sybil de Giffordが1052年にイギリススセックスで生まれた時，父Adam Osborn Giffard of Fonthilは43歳，母Weva Crefonは27歳であった。約1081年にスコットランドエルジンシュアイアでJohn de Comynと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼女は1098年にスコットランドインバーネス-シュアイアバデノチで46歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sybil de Gifford(이)가 1052년 영국 수세스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Adam Osborn Giffard of Fonthil(은)는 43세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Weva Crefon(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 대략 1081년 스컷랜드 엘긴실르에서 John de Comyn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1098년 스컷랜드 인버네스-실르 바데노치에서 46세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sybil de Gifford nasceu em 1052, em Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Adam Osborn Giffard of Fonthil, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Weva Crefon, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com John de Comyn aproximadamente 1081, em Elginshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1098, em Badenoch, Inverness-shire, Scotland, com 46 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sybil de Gifford родилась в 1052 г. в местности суссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Adam Osborn Giffard of Fonthil было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Weva Crefon, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John de Comyn около 1081 г. в местности элгиншир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Она умерла в 1098 г. в местности баденох, инвирнесс-шир, Шотландия в возрасте 46 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sybil de Gifford nació en 1052, en Sussex, Inglaterra, su papá, Adam Osborn Giffard of Fonthil, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Weva Crefon, tenía 27 años. Se casó con John de Comyn aproximadamente 1081, en Elginshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió en 1098, en Badenoch, Inverness-shire, Scotland, a la edad de 46 años.
